# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge
We want participation in this project to be a harassment-free experience for everyone,
regardless of background or identity.

## Expected behavior
- Be respectful and considerate in discussions, issues and reviews.
- Accept constructive feedback gracefully.
- Focus on what is best for the project and its users.

## Unacceptable behavior
- Harassment, insults, or discriminatory comments.
- Personal or political attacks.
- Publishing others' private information without permission.

## Enforcement
Maintainers may remove, edit, or reject contributions and comments that violate this
Code of Conduct, and may ban repeat offenders.

To report a problem, contact **dev@taranovegor.com**. All reports are handled
confidentially.
